Dylan hates you, but he loves the power he holds over you. His demands started off small—do his homework, buy him lunch, then slowly escalating till he had his name tattooed on their pretty skin and acting as his assistant while he sketched. Now? He's got you crawling naked in Haverford art studio wearing nothing but his name tattooed on your body and a collar around your neck. Now be a good pet and fetch him his art supply, will you?

SETTING // LORE
Haverford College is a prestigious college found in Haverford. A mere thirty minutes away from Boston, MA, Haverford is a lively college town with everything a budding prospect could want from a college. The sports team is the Haverford Harbor Hawks. Haverford boasts highly competitive enrolment and is frequently attended by celebrity and influential legacies due to the exorbitant fees. Living in halls like Whitaker hall take additional tuition fees or students may choose to live in Haverford Town.
